title: Organizer communications
description: Compose, schedule and audit messages for exact event audiences without exposing participant identities.
privacy_description: Only aggregate recipient and delivery totals are shown. Individual contact details never appear here.
load_error_description: Try again. No message was changed or sent.
empty_description: Create a draft, preview its exact audience and choose when to send it.
dead_letter_description: {{count}} deliveries exhausted automatic retries. Retry them after resolving the channel issue.
segments_description: Recipients are resolved from current registration, waitlist and attendance records when the message is scheduled.
body_description: Your wording is preserved exactly. The platform adds a translated greeting, heading and action link for each recipient.
preview_summary: {{recipients}} recipients and {{deliveries}} channel deliveries match this audience.
schedule_warning_title: The audience is frozen when you confirm
schedule_warning_description: The exact recipient set and channel work items become immutable audit evidence. You can cancel only before delivery starts.
load_detail_error: The message details could not be loaded.
preview_error: The audience preview could not be generated.
save_error: The draft could not be saved.
schedule_error: The message could not be scheduled.
cancel_error: The message could not be cancelled.
retry_error: Failed deliveries could not be queued again.
load_history_error: The audit history could not be loaded.
